# Folders

> Auto-generated from `/api/mcp/schema`. Run `dai sync` to regenerate.

## Tools

### `list_folders` — Folders

Lists doc folders in a datasphere, sorted by sortOrder. Useful for understanding the content structure before creating or moving pages.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `datasphereUri` | string | yes | Datasphere URI |

### `update_folder` — Update Folder

Renames a folder or changes its sort order. Use list_folders first to find the folder ID.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `datasphereUri` | string | yes | Datasphere URI |
| `id` | string | yes | Folder ID |
| `name` | string | no | New folder name |
| `sortOrder` | number | no | Display order (ascending) |
